stemHtml:
Select the statements that would correctly describe causes of hypoxia.

1. Heart problems may cause issues with the heart transporting blood around the body
2. Anaemic hypoxia is caused because CO₂ binds 200 times better with haemoglobin than O2
3. Hypoxia is caused by an increase in the pressure of oxygen in the atmosphere 
4. Hypoxia is caused by a decrease in the pressure of oxygen in the atmosphere 
5. Hypoxia is caused by a decrease in the percentage of oxygen in the atmosphere
